title: CAIR DRDO Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 50 Posts
org: Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics (CAIR DRDO)
shortInfo: he Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics (CAIR DRDO) has officially announced the Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 with 50 openings. The detailed notification was released in May 2026 at the official website of DRDO. Candidates who possess B.E./B.Tech. (Final Year) in relevant disciplines with First Division can apply through email mode on or before 04 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification PDF and check application details are available below.

basic_details.job_title: CAIR DRDO Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 50 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics (CAIR DRDO)
basic_details.short_information: he Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics (CAIR DRDO) has officially announced the Paid Intern Recruitment 2026 with 50 openings. The detailed notification was released in May 2026 at the official website of DRDO. Candidates who possess B.E./B.Tech. (Final Year) in relevant disciplines with First Division can apply through email mode on or before 04 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification PDF and check application details are available below.

age_limit.details: No specific age limit is mentioned for the Paid Intern posts in the official notification. Age relaxation details are not provided.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. (Final Year) in relevant discipline with First Division
qualification.details: Computer Science/Computer Engineering/Information Technology/Information Science/ AI-ML / Equivalent Subjects: B.E./B.Tech. (Final Year) in Computer Science/Information Technology/Information Science/AI-ML/ Equivalent Subjects (Ongoing) with First Division. Electronics & Communication/ Electronics Engineering/ Electrical and Electronics Engineering / equivalent Subjects: B.E./B.Tech. (Final Year) Electronics & Communication / Equivalent Subjects (Ongoing) with First Division.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Computer Science/Computer Engineering/Information Technology/Information Science/ AI-ML / Equivalent Subjects
Electronics & Communication/ Electronics Engineering/ Electrical and Electronics Engineering / equivalent Subjects

selection_process: 12th (Physics & Maths)/Diploma and Semester Percentages of B.Tech/BE Interview if necessary for shortlisted candidates
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CAIR DRDO Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CAIR DRDO Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CAIR DRDO Paid Intern posts is 04 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: A total of 50 vacancies are available for the Paid Intern positions at the Centre for Artificial Intelligence and Robotics (CAIR DRDO).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must be in their final year of B.E./B.Tech. in a relevant discipline and have secured First Division to be eligible for these internship roles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the stipend offered to the selected interns?
faq.answer: The selected interns will receive a fixed stipend of Rs. 5,000/- per month for the duration of their internship.

faq.question: Q5. How can candidates apply for the CAIR DRDO Paid Intern positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their resume and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the internship?
faq.answer: The internship is scheduled to commence on 01 July 2026 and will conclude on 31 December 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for the CAIR DRDO Paid Intern recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a weighted scoring of academic performance from 10th, 12th/Diploma, and B.Tech/BE semesters. An interview may be conducted for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CAIR DRDO located?
faq.answer: CAIR DRDO is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560093.

faq.question: Q10. What are the specific disciplines for the Computer Science related posts?
faq.answer: The Computer Science related posts cover disciplines such as Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, Information Science, AI-ML, and equivalent subjects.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the CAIR DRDO Paid Intern posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CAIR DRDO Paid Intern posts is 04 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.
